channel.title: Bioinformatics Notes on Ziye Wang
channel.description: Recent content in Bioinformatics Notes on Ziye Wang

item.title: Git
item.description: A compact Git note: mental model, daily commands, undo patterns, and quick access to the local PDF references.

item.title: Variant Toolkit
item.description: A practical guide to bcftools, vcftools, plink2, samtools, and bedtools for daily population-genetic workflows.

item.title: Cluster / SLURM
item.description: A compact HPC note for SLURM: job submission, monitoring, logs, resource requests, and common failure checks.
